Projects

Selected projects across AI, ML systems, and interactive computing

This page turns the project list into a cleaner case-study style layout so it reads well on both desktop and mobile while keeping demos, media, and links easy to scan.

Project 1

Crypto Reliability Tracker (BigScore)

An end-to-end crypto reliability scoring service that aggregates multi-source signals such as market integrity, development activity, and on-chain security into a calibrated 0-100 score.

  • Built a multi-agent style scoring pipeline from data fetch and schema normalization to subscore inference and weighted aggregation.
  • Created an API-backed user experience for real-time scoring with fallbacks for non-EVM assets and infrastructure edge cases.
  • Won 3rd place at HackNCState in the Agency Track.
Focus AI systems, scoring logic, and product packaging
Links
GitHub Devpost
Project 2

Thermoplastic Elastomer ML Predictor

A machine learning framework for predicting stress-strain curves from triblock copolymer parameters, with forward and inverse models supporting material performance exploration.

  • Predicted stress-strain curves from polymer structure-related parameters.
  • Integrated Bayesian optimization to support process and performance improvement.
  • Connected simulation parameters with physical behavior in a more interpretable workflow.
Focus Materials ML, prediction, and inverse design
Links
GitHub Forward Demo Video Inverse Demo Video
Project 3

CAE Model for Twin Screw Extruder Analysis

A convolutional autoencoder approach for analyzing and reconstructing twin screw extruder elements, supported by PCA for encoded-feature visualization.

  • Applied machine learning techniques to monitor and optimize extrusion processes.
  • Built representation learning workflows for screw element analysis and reconstruction.
  • Used PCA to reveal patterns in encoded features.
Focus Autoencoders, process modeling, and visualization
Links
GitHub
Project 4

Game AI Design

A collection of game AI experiments spanning movement behaviors, classic path finding, and reinforcement-learning-driven agents in interactive environments.

  • Implemented AI behaviors such as orientation and evade strategies.
  • Built Dijkstra and A* path-finding workflows for navigation problems.
  • Explored multi-agent behaviors and RL in game scenarios.
Focus Interactive AI, search, and RL experiments
Links
CSC584 Repo Deadzone DQN Repo Deadzone Demo Flock Demo Path Finding Demo
The Game AI demos are now provided as H.264 .mp4 files for better browser and mobile compatibility.
Project 5

NASA Close Approach ML Analysis

A Near-Earth Object analysis workflow combining NASA JPL data and close-approach API data to study object characteristics, cluster patterns, and classification performance.

  • Merged CSV datasets with live NASA data, cleaned missing values, and normalized numerical features.
  • Performed EDA, K-Means clustering, KNN classification, and PCA visualization.
  • Used the project as a compact end-to-end ML analysis case study.
Focus Data cleaning, clustering, classification, and visual analysis
Links
GitHub

Built with Jekyll and a lighter, cleaner portfolio direction.
